project.name: Analisis de Sentimientos - IMDb Movie Reviews

academic_context.subject: Procesamiento de Lenguaje Natural (PLN)
academic_context.reference_paper: Keerthi Kumar & Harish (2019) - Sentiment Analysis on IMDb Movie Reviews Using Hybrid Feature Extraction Method

patterns: Dual Data Layer (Supabase-first with local fallback)
Lazy-loaded ML models with fallback heuristic
Standalone Angular components with lazy loading

decisions.title: FastAPI como framework backend
decisions.context: Necesitamos una API REST para servir datos NLP al frontend Angular
decisions.decision: FastAPI por su rendimiento, tipado automatico y documentacion OpenAPI integrada

decisions.title: Angular 19 con standalone components
decisions.context: Necesitamos un frontend interactivo para 9 vistas academicas
decisions.decision: Angular 19 con lazy loading y standalone components, sin NgModules

decisions.title: Datos pre-calculados con prediccion en vivo
decisions.context: El entrenamiento de modelos ML toma minutos, pero los datos del dashboard deben ser instantaneos
decisions.decision: Modelo hibrido: resultados pre-calculados en model_results.py + prediccion en vivo via SVM real o heuristica
consequences: Prediccion real disponible con modelo SVM serializado

decisions.title: Supabase con fallback a datos locales
decisions.context: Necesitamos persistencia opcional sin bloquear funcionalidad offline
decisions.decision: db_service.py intenta Supabase primero, si falla usa datos de data/*.py

decisions.title: Forest Design System (CSS-only)
decisions.context: Necesitamos un sistema de diseno coherente sin dependencias JS extras
decisions.decision: Forest DS: 8 modulos CSS (theme, components, layout, dark-surface, animations, utilities, print, main)

decisions.title: Correccion BUG-001: LR training time
decisions.context: El tiempo de entrenamiento de Logistic Regression era 12.47s, inconsistente con max_iter=100
decisions.decision: Ajustar a 5.67s tras reducir solver de saga a lbfgs con max_iter=1000
consequences: Datos consistentes en PRD y README

decisions.title: SVM real con fallback heuristica
decisions.context: La prediccion heuristica funciona pero no es un modelo ML real
decisions.decision: model_service.py carga SVM serializado via joblib, fallback a keyword heuristic si no existe
consequences: Prediccion real cuando hay modelo entrenado

decisions.title: Docker Compose para orquestacion
decisions.context: Necesitamos despliegue reproducible con backend + frontend + Redis
decisions.decision: docker-compose.yml con 3 servicios: backend (Python), frontend (Nginx), Redis

preferences.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + Forest Design System (CSS-only)

recent_tasks.description: Initial project setup: FastAPI backend + Angular 19 frontend
Implement 14 REST endpoints across 5 routers + argilla
Build 9 frontend views with lazy loading
Add Docker Compose + CI/CD with GitHub Actions
Implement real SVM model support with joblib
Add TypeScript interfaces, remove dead code
Execute all 10 NXT agents (orchestrator through devops)
NXT Context agent - full context persistence
NXT Resume - checkpoint and recovery document generation
Redesign /informe page with interactive cards and modals per section
Redesign /entregables page with dual modal system (entregables + criteria)
Train ML models on IMDb 50K: NB 87.27%, LR 90.04%, SVM 89.80%
Fix PDF generation: xhtml2pdf engine, 10 pages within 12-page limit
Activity requirements gap analysis from DOCX rubric

common_patterns: Service layer abstracts data access (db_service.py wraps Supabase + local)
Pre-calculated data in data/*.py for instant API responses
Lazy-loaded ML models with graceful fallback
Standalone Angular components with lazy routing
Forest Design System for consistent dark-theme UI

learned_preferences.value: Spanish language for all user-facing documentation
Integration tests for endpoints + unit tests for services
Pre-calculated results for demo, real ML for prediction
